channel.title: Comments on: Clipper City Brewing’s Small Craft Warning (Über Pils) – Ep. 47
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: dave@Classic
item.dc:creator: dave@Classic
item.description: love heavey seas. this is a great take on a pilsner. You should do an episode on thier Loose Cannon triple IPA its awsome. and you have to love the parrot on the labels!
item.content:encoded: love heavey seas. this is a great take on a pilsner. You should do an episode on thier Loose Cannon triple IPA its awsome. and you have to love the parrot on the labels!

item.title: By: Thomas Cizauskas
item.dc:creator: Thomas Cizauskas
item.description: As a past Territory Manager for Clipper City, I'm appreciating this review. Thanks! The Heavy Seas line features three year-round beers (including Small Craft Warning) and five seasonals.
item.content:encoded: As a past Territory Manager for Clipper City, I’m appreciating this review. Thanks! The Heavy Seas line features three year-round beers (including Small Craft Warning) and five seasonals.

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description: Sorry I missed this one. I'm not a big pilsener fan but Uber Pils is a nice one. Actually, it's also one of the year round Heavy Seas beers along with my absolutely favorite pizza beer, Loose Cannon. Thanks Hugh.
item.content:encoded: Sorry I missed this one. I’m not a big pilsener fan but Uber Pils is a nice one. Actually, it’s also one of the year round Heavy Seas beers along with my absolutely favorite pizza beer, Loose Cannon. Thanks Hugh.

item.title: By: t.b.
item.dc:creator: t.b.
item.description: Thanks for the plug, much appreciated! Hope Pink's getting some sleep with the newborns? Will try this product out for sure! Looks Tasty!! Nice Job guys!!!
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for the plug, much appreciated!
Hope Pink’s getting some sleep with the newborns?
Will try this product out for sure!
Looks Tasty!!
Nice Job guys!!!
